- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created. — File re-added after scaffolding.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements — Build a Next.js portfolio with Tailwind CSS and Framer Motion.

- [x] Scaffold the Project — Ran `npx create-next-app@latest . --ts --tailwind --eslint --app --src-dir --import-alias "@/*" --use-npm`.

- [x] Customize the Project — Added animated sections (hero, about, projects, skills, experience, testimonials, contact) and supporting data/components using Tailwind CSS and Framer Motion.

- [x] Install Required Extensions — No extensions requested for this setup.

- [x] Compile the Project — `npm run lint` and `npm run build` succeeded with no errors.

- [x] Create and Run Task — Added a VS Code task for `npm run dev` and launched it once.

- [ ] Launch the Project — Pending user confirmation to run the dev server.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete — README refreshed and instructions cleaned of HTML comments.

Execution Guidelines

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
- Avoid verbose explanations or printing full command outputs.
- Do not explain project structure unless asked.
